import { OperatorFunction } from '../types'; export declare function reduce<V, A = V>(accumulator: (acc: A | V, value: V, index: number) => A): OperatorFunction<V, V | A>; export declare function reduce<V, A>(accumulator: (acc: A, value: V, index: number) => A, seed: A): OperatorFunction<V, A>; export declare function reduce<V, A, S = A>(accumulator: (acc: A | S, value: V, index: number) => A, seed: S): OperatorFunction<V, A>; //# sourceMappingURL=reduce.d.ts.map
